<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04, column D. Moving forward from my current position will take me to row 02, column C, which is safe (floor). I should move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
Now I am at row 02, column C, facing right (`>`). If I move forward, the next cell is row 02, column D, which is floor and safe. Continuing straight will bring me closer to column D where I can then navigate down to the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward leads to column E which is a wall (`#`) and not accessible. I need to change direction to face down (`v`) to move towards the goal. From facing right, turning clockwise will face me down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing down (`v`). The cell below at row 03, column D is floor and safe, so moving forward is the best action to get closer to the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03, column D, facing down (`v`). Moving forward leads to row 04, column D which is the goal (`O`). Therefore, I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
